selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: published evidence links high returns in standard monthly option-expiration weeks to option-market-maker hedge unwinding and declining option-implied risk; the fourth-Friday week is the frozen equal-duration calendar comparator
selection_without_outcomes.primary_literature: Stivers and Sun, Journal of Banking and Finance 37 (2013) 4226-4240, DOI 10.1016/j.jbankfin.2013.07.015
selection_without_outcomes.official_calendar_rule: Cboe standard monthly options expire on the third Friday; a holiday moves expiry to the prior accepted session but not outside the same Monday-Sunday week
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: calendar-defined option-expiration hedge mechanics use neither market outcomes nor macro, price-shape, volume, distribution-growth, monthly earnings-season or static-allocation states; the signal is one fixed week and one prespecified equal-duration comparator

signal.source: accepted XNYS session calendar identity already bound by the frozen runtime bundles
signal.strategy_rule: hold SPY only for the Monday-Sunday calendar week containing the third Friday; otherwise hold cash
signal.comparator_rule: hold SPY only for the Monday-Sunday calendar week containing the fourth Friday; otherwise hold cash
signal.holiday_rule: if the third or fourth Friday is not an accepted XNYS session, classification remains based on the calendar Friday and execution remains the first accepted session of that week
signal.availability_rule: calendar ordinal is known before the 09:00 America/New_York decision; historical prices remain retrospective-secondary only
signal.missing_rule: fail closed on incomplete weekly boundaries, calendar identity drift, missing lifecycle or company-action evidence, missing SPY raw open/decision close, or source/hash drift; no shifted week, alternate comparator, price overlay, source blend or confirmation filter
signal.ancestry_limitation: the execution outcomes use the retrospective Tiingo snapshot without qualified historical price available_at, so any pass remains retrospective secondary evidence only

timing_and_account.decision: 09:00 America/New_York on the first accepted XNYS session of each Monday-Sunday week
timing_and_account.holding: until the following week's first accepted XNYS open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding accepted-session close available before decision
timing_and_account.comparator: fourth-Friday-week SPY/cash portfolio under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal, position, cash balance or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 100 complete weekly intervals and 24 third-Friday plus 24 fourth-Friday intervals per split, with no overlap

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the fourth-Friday comparator
strategy terminal net wealth strictly above initial capital
arithmetic mean paired weekly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the fourth-Friday comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the fourth-Friday comparator
strategy terminal net wealth strictly above initial capital
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the fourth-Friday comparator
uncentered type-7 0.05 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over weekly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(100000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the four-week block is an outcome-blind monthly-dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
